name: Guizhou Transportation Planning Survey&Design Academe Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guizhou Transportation Planning Survey&Design Academe Co.,Ltd. engages in the engineering consulting and contracting business in China and internationally. It offers consulting, test and inspection, supervision, construction, and general contracting services for roads, bridges, tunnels, ports, and waterways, as well as geotechnical, electromechanical, municipal, and construction projects. The company was founded in 1958 and is based in Guiyang, China.
